outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit combines a brown cotton fleece sweatshirt with a navy wool cardigan, paired with beige wool suit pants. The look is refined with leather Chelsea boots and a braided suede belt. The ensemble balances comfort and elegance, suitable for transitional weather and smart daily occasions.

model_attributes.body: Athletic and well-proportioned with a confident and dynamic demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Mid-air jump with one leg bent, arms creating asymmetrical shapes expressing fluid motion.
model_attributes.background: Underwater-themed with ancient ruins and vibrant aquatic flora scattered on the seabed.

outfit.P00832329: blue wool cardigan with heart logo
